__help__.what_is_this: Maps each PDF filename in docs/ to its citation metadata. Add one block per PDF you drop in. Keys starting with __ are ignored by the ingester.

fields.source_url: Where the PDF came from (for traceability)
fields.publication_date: YYYY or YYYY-MM. Drives the >5-year staleness flag.
fields.evidence_level: one of: guideline | RCT | review | case_study | unknown

pd1.pdf.source_title: JNC7 — Seventh Report of the Joint National Committee on Prevention, Detection, Evaluation, and Treatment of High Blood Pressure (Complete Report)

pd2.pdf.source_title: Diagnosis and Management of Q Fever — United States, 2013 (CDC MMWR Recommendations and Reports, Vol. 62 / RR-3)

pd3.pdf.source_title: 2023 ACC/AHA/ACCP/HRS Guideline for the Diagnosis and Management of Atrial Fibrillation
